infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Modkharat needs microphone access to record voice transactions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Modkharat needs camera access to scan receipts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Modkharat needs photo library access to select receipt images.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Modkharat to access your microphone to record transaction details.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Modkharat to access your photos to select receipt images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Modkharat to access your camera to scan receipts.
